title: The Family Table By Josephs – Full Premium Multi-Page Restaurant Website

requirements.text: Create a multi-page React frontend with 5 pages: Home, About, Menu, Gallery, and Contact. Implement client-side routing between all pages. Apply a globally consistent warm cozy premium theme using color palette: Warm Cream (#FFF6E9) as background, Soft Brown (#6B4F4F) for text, Terracotta (#D17A5B) for primary accents and CTAs, and Olive Green (#6A8D73) for secondary accents. Use an elegant handwritten-style Google Font (e.g. Playfair Display or Cormorant Garamond) for all headings and a clean modern sans-serif (e.g. Lato or Inter) for body text. Apply soft rounded UI elements, subtle background textures, soft shadows, and smooth scroll behavior throughout. All pages must be fully responsive and mobile-first.

quotes: Theme: Cozy modern café + premium family dining
Color Palette: Warm Cream (#FFF6E9), Soft Brown (#6B4F4F), Terracotta (#D17A5B), Olive Green accents (#6A8D73)

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 pages (Home, About, Menu, Gallery, Contact) are accessible via navigation links
Brand colors (#FFF6E9, #6B4F4F, #D17A5B, #6A8D73) are consistently applied
Handwritten-style heading font and modern sans-serif body font are used site-wide
Layout is fully responsive and looks correct on mobile, tablet, and desktop

requirements.text: Implement a sticky top navigation bar with the restaurant name 'The Family Table By Josephs' as the logo/brand text on the left, and navigation links (Home, About, Menu, Gallery, Contact) on the right. On mobile, collapse to a hamburger menu. Apply a warm cream background with subtle shadow on scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar sticks to the top on scroll
All 5 page links are present and functional
On mobile, hamburger menu toggles the navigation links
Navbar shows a soft shadow after scrolling down

requirements.text: Build the Home page with the following sections in order: (1) Hero section with the generated hero banner image, headline 'Where Every Meal Feels Like Home', subheadline 'A Cozy Place For Family & Friends', and two CTA buttons: 'Explore Menu' (navigates to Menu page) and 'Book a Table' (scrolls to or navigates to the reservation form). (2) Signature Dishes section highlighting 4 featured items with food card images, names, and short descriptions. (3) 'Why Families Love Us' section with 3–4 icon+text feature highlights (e.g. fresh ingredients, family atmosphere, cozy ambiance, memorable moments). (4) Customer Stories section with 2–3 warm testimonial quote cards. (5) Instagram Preview section with a grid of 6 placeholder tiles linking to https://www.instagram.com/thefamilytablebandra. (6) Reservation CTA banner section prompting visitors to book a table. Apply fade-in on scroll animation to each section.

quotes: Headline: 'Where Every Meal Feels Like Home'
Subheadline: 'A Cozy Place For Family & Friends'

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays banner image with correct headline, subheadline, and two CTAs
'Explore Menu' CTA navigates to Menu page
'Book a Table' CTA navigates to reservation form
All 6 home sections are present and rendered in order
Sections fade in as user scrolls down
Instagram tiles link to the correct Instagram URL

requirements.text: Build the About page with: a headline about the story behind The Family Table By Josephs, a paragraph about the family-focused dining concept and memory-making mission with tagline 'Creating Memories With Your Family', a section about fresh ingredients philosophy, a description of the cozy ambiance, and a decorative image section using the generated about/interior image. Use warm card-style layout with soft shadows.
acceptanceCriteria: About page contains restaurant story, family concept, ingredients philosophy, and ambiance sections
Tagline 'Creating Memories With Your Family' is prominently displayed
Image section renders the about/interior visual

requirements.text: Build the Menu page displaying all real menu items grouped by the following categories in this exact order: Roti Rolls, Starters, Fried, Eggs, Non Veg Pizza, Veg Pizza, Sandwiches, Burgers, Non Veg Snacks, Hot Dogs, Veg Snacks, Tea, Drinks (Beverages), Mojito, Coffee, Milkshakes, Mango Beverages, Salad, Meals, Stuffed Poee, Bacon and Ham Quiche, Grilled Chicken Quiche, Shepherds Pie, Corn Spinach Quiche. Implement a horizontal scrollable or sticky category tab/pill filter bar at the top so users can jump directly to any category. Each menu item card must display: a placeholder food image, item name, short description (where provided), price in ₹, a vegetarian badge (green leaf icon) for items marked Vegetarian, and an 'Order via WhatsApp' button that opens https://wa.me/919167340197. Use rounded card design with hover scale animation and Instagram-style grid layout (3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile). Populate all items exactly as provided with their real prices and descriptions.

quotes: Each item must include: Image, Name, Short description, Price placeholder, 'Order / Book Table' button

acceptanceCriteria: All 24 menu categories are present with correct items, names, descriptions, and prices
Category filter bar allows jumping to each section
Vegetarian items display a green vegetarian badge
Each card shows a placeholder image, name, description, price, and WhatsApp order button
Cards have hover scale animation
Grid is responsive: 3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile

requirements.text: Build the Gallery page with a masonry-style grid layout displaying all 12 generated placeholder gallery images (food, ambiance, interior, customer moments categories). Implement a lightbox overlay: clicking any image opens a fullscreen preview with smooth fade/zoom animation, a close button, and left/right navigation arrows to cycle through images.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery page renders all placeholder images in a masonry grid
Clicking any image opens a lightbox overlay
Lightbox has close, previous, and next navigation
Lightbox open/close uses smooth fade or zoom animation

requirements.text: Build the Contact page displaying: full address '3R6J+J44 Epitome, 29th Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050', a Google Maps public iframe embed using the provided plus code location (3R6J+J44 Bandra West, Mumbai), a 'Call Us' button linking to tel:+919167340197, a 'WhatsApp Us' button linking to https://wa.me/919167340197, an Instagram link to https://www.instagram.com/thefamilytablebandra, and an opening hours section with placeholder hours (e.g. Mon–Sun 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM). Style with warm card layout consistent with the site theme.

quotes: Use the location i already provided to you
3R6J+J44 Epitome, 29th Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050

acceptanceCriteria: Full address is displayed correctly
Google Maps iframe renders the correct Bandra West location
Call button links to tel:+919167340197
WhatsApp button links to https://wa.me/919167340197
Instagram link opens https://www.instagram.com/thefamilytablebandra
Opening hours section is present

requirements.text: Implement a WhatsApp Table Reservation form accessible from the Home page 'Book a Table' CTA and as a standalone section/page. The form must include fields: Full Name (text, required), Phone Number (tel, required), Date (date picker, required), Time (time picker, required), Number of Guests (number, required, min 1), Special Requests (textarea, optional). On valid submission, redirect the browser to: https://wa.me/919167340197?text=New%20Table%20Booking%20%E2%80%93%20The%20Family%20Table%20By%20Josephs%0AName%3A%20{name}%0APhone%3A%20{phone}%0ADate%3A%20{date}%0ATime%3A%20{time}%0AGuests%3A%20{guests}%0ASpecial%20Request%3A%20{specialRequest} with all fields URL-encoded. Show real-time validation errors for required fields. Display a friendly animated success/confirmation message briefly before redirecting. Style the form with terracotta accent buttons and rounded warm card design.

quotes: New Table Booking – The Family Table By Josephs

acceptanceCriteria: Form has all 6 fields: Full Name, Phone, Date, Time, Guests, Special Requests
Submitting with missing required fields shows inline validation errors
On valid submit, browser is redirected to the correct wa.me URL with all fields pre-filled in the message
A brief animated success confirmation is shown before redirect
Form is styled with the warm terracotta/cream palette and rounded inputs

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page. The button must link to https://wa.me/919167340197, display the WhatsApp icon, use a terracotta or green background, include a subtle pulse animation, and have a tooltip label 'Chat with us on WhatsApp' on hover.
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp floating button is visible on all pages at bottom-right
Clicking opens https://wa.me/919167340197
Button has a pulse animation
Tooltip appears on hover

requirements.text: Implement an elegant footer present on all pages. Include: restaurant name and tagline 'Creating Memories With Your Family', navigation links (Home, About, Menu, Gallery, Contact), address '3R6J+J44 Epitome, 29th Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050', WhatsApp link (+919167340197), Instagram link (https://www.instagram.com/thefamilytablebandra), social icons, and a copyright line. Use warm cream/soft brown color scheme with olive green accent links.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer appears on all 5 pages
Footer contains restaurant name, tagline, nav links, address, WhatsApp, Instagram, and copyright
Social icons are present and link correctly

requirements.text: Store the complete restaurant menu data (all categories and items with names, descriptions, prices, and vegetarian flags) in the Motoko backend as stable structured data. Expose a query endpoint to retrieve all menu categories and items so the frontend Menu page fetches real data from the canister.

quotes: Each item must include: Name, Short description, Price

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores all 24 categories and their items with correct names, descriptions, prices, and vegetarian flags
A query function returns all menu data
Frontend Menu page successfully fetches and renders data from the backend

requirements.text: Add SEO meta tags to the React app: set the page title to 'The Family Table By Josephs – Bandra West, Mumbai', add meta description 'A cozy premium family restaurant in Bandra West, Mumbai. Creating Memories With Your Family. View our full menu, book a table, and visit us today.', and add Open Graph tags for title, description, and image (using the hero banner asset).
acceptanceCriteria: Page title is set to 'The Family Table By Josephs – Bandra West, Mumbai'
Meta description tag is present with the specified content
Open Graph tags for og:title, og:description, og:image are present

constraints: Do NOT use blue or purple anywhere in the design; stick strictly to the specified palette: #FFF6E9, #6B4F4F, #D17A5B, #6A8D73
WhatsApp number must be exactly +919167340197 in all links and forms
Google Maps embed must use the public iframe approach with the provided plus code location (no API key)
All menu item names, descriptions, and prices must match exactly as provided by the user — do not alter or fabricate any menu data
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time order management or online ordering system
CMS or admin panel for menu editing
